---
title: "Manuscript figures (dataset 1)"
author: "SK"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmdformats::robobook:
    highlight: kate
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
.libPaths(new = "/mnt/nfs/simo/rpack_4_4/")
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)
library(reshape2)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(cellmig)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```


```{r}
d1 <- get(load("data/dataset_1.RData"))
rm(d)
```


```{r}
m <- aggregate(v~well+plate, data = d1, FUN = mean)
colnames(m) <- c("well", "plate", "mu")
v <- aggregate(v~well+plate, data = d1, FUN = var)
colnames(v) <- c("well", "plate", "var")
D <- merge(x = m, y = v, by = c("well", "plate"))
D$kappa <- D$mu/D$var
D$alpha <- D$mu*D$kappa
D$sd <- sqrt(D$var)
rm(m, v)
```


```{r}
mean(log((D$mu^2)/D$var))
```


```{r}
g1 <- ggplot(data = D)+
    geom_point(aes(x = mu, y = var), size = 0.7, alpha = 0.5)+
    xlab(label = "Mean")+
    ylab(label = "Variance")+
    theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
    theme(legend.position = "top")+
    scale_x_log10()+
    scale_y_log10()+
    annotation_logticks(base = 10, sides = "lb")

g2 <- ggplot(data = D)+
    geom_density(aes(mu^2/var), col = "red")+
  geom_density(data = data.frame(y = exp(rnorm(n=10^5, mean = 1.5, sd = 1))), aes(y), alpha = 0.5)+
    xlab(label = "Mean^2/Variance")+
    ylab(label = "Count")+
    theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
    theme(legend.position = "top")+
  scale_x_log10()+
  annotation_logticks(base = 10, sides = "b")

g3 <- ggplot()+
    geom_density(data = D, aes(log(mu)), col = "steelblue", alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_density(data = d1, aes(log(v)), col = "orange", alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_density(data = data.frame(y = rnorm(n=10^5, mean = -0.5, sd = 1)), aes(y), alpha = 0.5)+
    xlab(label = expression("log(v)"))+
    ylab(label = "Density")+
    theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
    theme(legend.position = "none")
```


```{r}
g <- (g1|g2|g3)+patchwork::plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A')
g
```

```{r}
ggsave(file = "manuscript_dataset_1/Supplementary_priors.pdf", 
       plot = g, device = "pdf", width = 7, height = 2.3)
```
